---
title: "main-functions"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{main-functions}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(femleadR)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
olympic_data <- load_data()
```



```{r}

olympic_data|>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(n_monarchies = sum(is_monarchy, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_monarchies)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Number of Monarchies Over Time",
       x = "Year", y = "Count")
```
```{r}
olympic_data |>
  count(regime_category) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(regime_category, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = "Count by Regime Type", x = "Regime", y = "Count")
```

```{r}
olympic_data|>
  group_by(year) |>
  summarize(n_democracies = sum(is_democracy, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n_democracies)) +
  geom_line() +
  labs(title = "Number of Democracies Over Time")
```
```{r}
#' Summarize Regime Types by Year
#'
#' Returns a summary table counting the number of each 
#' regime type per year.
#'
#' @param data A dataframe from \code{load_data()}
#' @param min_year Minimum year to filter by. Default is NULL (all years).
#' @param max_year Maximum year to filter by. Default is NULL (all years).
#'
#' @return A tibble with columns: year, regime_category, count
#' @importFrom dplyr filter group_by summarize n
#' @export

summarize_regimes <- function(olympic_data, min_year = NULL, max_year = NULL) {
  
  if (!is.null(min_year)) olympic_data <- dplyr::filter(olympic_data, year >= min_year)
  if (!is.null(max_year)) olympic_data <- dplyr::filter(olympic_data, year <= max_year)
  
  olympic_data |>
    dplyr::group_by(year, regime_category) |>
    dplyr::summarize(count = dplyr::n(), .groups = "drop")
}
```


```{r}
#' Plot Monarchies vs Democracies Over Time
#'
#' Creates a line plot comparing the number of monarchies 
#' and democracies over time.
#'
#' @param data A dataframe from \code{load_data()}
#' @param min_year Minimum year to include. Default is NULL (all years).
#'
#' @return A ggplot object
#' @importFrom dplyr filter group_by summarize
#' @importFrom tidyr pivot_longer
#' @importFrom ggplot2 ggplot aes geom_line labs
#' @export
plot_regimes <- function(olympic_data, min_year = NULL) {
  
  if (!is.null(min_year)) olympic_data <- dplyr::filter(olympic_data, year >= min_year)
  
  olympic_data |>
    dplyr::group_by(year) |>
    dplyr::summarize(
      monarchies = sum(is_monarchy, na.rm = TRUE),
      democracies = sum(is_democracy, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) |>
    tidyr::pivot_longer(cols = c(monarchies, democracies),
                        names_to = "type",
                        values_to = "count") |>
    ggplot2::ggplot(ggplot2::aes(x = year, y = count, color = type)) +
    ggplot2::geom_line() +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = "Monarchies vs Democracies Over Time",
      x = "Year",
      y = "Count",
      color = "Regime Type"
    )
}
```

```{r}
#' Summarize Regime Changes by Year
#'
#' Returns a summary table counting the number of countries
#' that switched regime categories compared to the previous year.
#'
#' @param data A dataframe from \code{load_data()}
#' @param min_year Minimum year to filter by. Default is NULL (all years).
#' @param max_year Maximum year to filter by. Default is NULL (all years).
#'
#' @return A tibble with columns: year, n_changes
#' @importFrom dplyr filter group_by arrange mutate summarize n
#' @export
summarize_regime_changes <- function(data, min_year = NULL, max_year = NULL) {

  if (!is.null(min_year)) data <- dplyr::filter(data, year >= min_year)
  if (!is.null(max_year)) data <- dplyr::filter(data, year <= max_year)

  data |>
    dplyr::arrange(country_name, year) |>
    dplyr::group_by(country_name) |>
    dplyr::mutate(regime_changed = regime_category != dplyr::lag(regime_category)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(year) |>
    dplyr::summarize(
      n_changes = sum(regime_changed, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}
```
